goal: Create a premium scratch card experience inspired by Paytm / PhonePe

visualStyle.cardSurface: rounded 28px with soft border and glow
visualStyle.scratchOverlay: silver gradient with subtle metallic noise
visualStyle.revealPanel: rich emerald / cyan accent with sparkle glints

typography.headline: Bold, high contrast white
typography.label: Uppercase micro copy with tracking
typography.body: Soft slate text for secondary details

interaction.feedback: full clear with reward reveal and confetti style accents
interaction.successState: collect reward button and copy code action

states.available: Silver overlay visible, slide to scratch
states.unlocked: Reward details visible, collect action active

recommendations.placement: Use on donation success and reward dashboard screens
recommendations.UX: Keep copy button visible only after reveal, add a status chip, and use rich gradients for premium feel
